race_meta.race_name: Oddschecker Free Bets Novices' Hurdle (Qualifier) (Class 4) (Division II)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked cosmic connection at position 7 with only 2.0% probability. Top pick was Wondering Why (30.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Wondering Why > King Al, but actual result was Cosmic Connection > Road To Wembley. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Cosmic Connection had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -1.8%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
